name: geotab-smart-sdk
description: A smart, composable Node.js SDK for the MyGeotab API — built on top of mg-api-js with adaptive feeds, named diagnostics, and use-case-driven helpers.

scripts.test: node --test --test-reporter=spec test/sdk.test.js test/diagnostics.test.js test/event-emitter.test.js test/entity-cache.test.js test/rate-limiter.test.js test/trackers.test.js test/queries.test.js test/feeds.test.js
scripts.test:watch: node --test --watch test/sdk.test.js test/diagnostics.test.js test/event-emitter.test.js test/entity-cache.test.js test/rate-limiter.test.js test/trackers.test.js test/queries.test.js test/feeds.test.js
scripts.test:coverage: node --test --experimental-test-coverage test/sdk.test.js test/diagnostics.test.js test/event-emitter.test.js test/entity-cache.test.js test/rate-limiter.test.js test/trackers.test.js test/queries.test.js test/feeds.test.js

author: Kunal Kamble
